rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass, improving sentence structure and terminology consistency throughout the text.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent notes uncertainty in two places (balance-delta prices and re-planning), it does not consistently mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres to the original scope, covering exactly the agreed-upon topics without introducing new, unrelated content.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful patterns were introduced in the revised text; the agent's changes improved clarity and precision.
rationale.RX.5: Most non-cosmetic changes are annotated with reasons (e.g., standardizing terminology), but not all edits include explicit sources.
